# GitHub Repo Settings

Apply these values via the GitHub web UI. They cannot be set from the CLI.

---

## About (gear icon on repo page)

**Description:**
```
A visual modular synthesizer in your browser — patch, play, and see sound.
```

**Website:**
```
https://patchglow.app
```

**Topics:**
```
synthesizer, modular-synth, eurorack, web-audio, tone-js, music-education, react, typescript, visualization, open-source
```

**Include in the home page:**
- [x] Releases
- [x] Deployments

---

## Social Preview (Settings > General > Social Preview)

Upload a 1280x640 PNG image. Use `public/og-image.png` as a starting point, or create a dedicated social preview image.

---

## Branch Protection (Settings > Branches)

Consider adding a branch protection rule for `main`:
- Require pull request reviews before merging
- Require status checks to pass (if CI is added later)
